description_long: This object is an open book with a brown cover and white pages, displayed with its spine at the bottom and pages fanned out. The pages are blank except for two bold, black vertical lines running down each visible page, giving a stylized or minimalist appearance. The book's cover is slightly thicker and darker than the pages, suggesting a sturdy construction. The edges of the pages are clean and straight, with no visible text, images, or markings aside from the black lines. The book appears to be of average size, suitable for personal reading or note-taking. Its simple design makes it versatile for use in various urban settings such as parks, cafes, or libraries.
description: An open book with a brown cover and white pages, featuring bold black vertical lines on each page. The design is minimalist and clean, with no visible text or illustrations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open book with both pages visible and two bold black lines on each page.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thickness of the book and the layered appearance of the pages, with the cover visible at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the open pages and black lines, but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the book's thickness and the stacked pages, with the cover at the base.
